info.title: Harness NextGen Software Delivery Platform API Reference
info.description: This is the Open Api Spec 3 for the NextGen Manager. This is under active development. Beware of the breaking change with respect to the generated code stub

tags.name: Project Services
tags.description: This contains APIs for performing CRUD operations on Services.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Slug field of the organization the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Slug field of the project the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: Slug field of the service the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: harness_account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

example-1.value:
service:
  account: sample_account
  slug: example_service
  org: sample_organization
  project: sample_project
  name: Example_service
  description: This is a example service
  tags:
    example-tag-1: example-tag-1-value
    example-tag-2: example-tag-2-value
  yaml: |
    service:
      name: "Example_service"
      identifier: "example_service"
      tags: {}
created: 1234567890
updated: 1234567890

get.description: Returns all services that the current user has view permissions for given project.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Slug field of the organization the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Slug field of the project the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number strategy: Specify the page number within the paginated collection related to the number of items in each page

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Pagination: Number of items to return

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: This would be used to filter resources having attributes matching with search term.

parameters.name: service_ids
parameters.description: List of Service Identifiers

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parameter on the basis of which sorting is done.

parameters.name: is_access_list
parameters.description: Specify whether list an access list or not. Access List refers to list of services that current user has permission to use in the pipeline.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Service Definition type

parameters.name: git_ops_enabled
parameters.description: Enables use of this service in Harness GitOps PR Pipelines

parameters.name: harness_account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order on the basis of which sorting is done.

Link.description: Links to related resources, in the format defined by [RFC 5988](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-5). This will include a link with relation type `next` to the next page, if there is a next page.

example-1.value:
- service:
    account: sample_account
    slug: example_service
    org: sample_organization
    project: sample_project
    name: Example_service
    description: This is a example service
    tags:
      example-tag-1: example-tag-1-value
      example-tag-2: example-tag-2-value
    yaml: |
      service:
        name: "Example_service"
        identifier: "example_service"
        tags: {}
  created: 1234567890
  updated: 1234567890

parameters.name: secret
parameters.description: Slug field of secrets

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Secret types on which the filter will be applied

parameters.name: recursive
parameters.description: Expand current scope to include all child scopes

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: This would be used to filter resources having attributes matching with search term.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number strategy: Specify the page number within the paginated collection related to the number of items in each page

parameters.description: Pagination: Number of items to return

Link.description: Links to related resources, in the format defined by [RFC 5988](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-5). This will include a link with relation type `next` to the next page, if there is a next page.Link

- secret:
    name: example_secret
    slug: example_secret
    org: default
    project: example_project
    tags:
      property1: example_secret
    description: example_secret
    spec:
      type: SSHKeyPath
      port: 80
      username: example_secret
      key_path: example_secret
      encrypted_passphrase: account.example_secret
  created: 1234567890
  updated: 1234567890
  draft: false

get.description: Retrieves the information of the secret.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Slug field of the organization the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Slug field of the project the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: secret
parameters.description: Slug field of the secret

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

example-secret-response-yaml.value:
secret:
  name: example_secret
  slug: example_secret
  org: default
  project: example_project
  tags:
    property1: example_secret
  description: example_secret
  spec:
    type: SSHKeyPath
    port: 80
    username: example_secret
    key_path: example_secret
    encrypted_passphrase: account.example_secret
created: 1234567890
updated: 1234567890
draft: false

Service.title: Service
Service.description: This is the Service entity defined in Harness

ServiceResponse.title: Default Response
ServiceResponse.description: Default response when a service is returned

harness_managed.description: This indicates if this organization is managed by Harness or not. If true, Harness can manage and modify this organization.

type.description: This specifies the type of secret

encrypted_passphrase.description: This is the passphrase provided while creating the SSH key for local encryption

encrypted_passphrase.description: This is the passphrase provided while creating the SSH key for local encryption

secret_manager_slug.description: Slug of the secret manager used to manage the secret

SecretTextSpec.title: SecretText
SecretTextSpec.description: This is the SSH key authentication details defined in Harness.

secret_manager_slug.description: Slug of the secret manager used to manage the secret

value_type.description: This has details to specify if the secret value is inline or referenced

WinRmTGTKeyTabFileSpec.title: WinRmTGTKeyTabFile
WinRmTGTKeyTabFileSpec.description: This is the SSH key authentication details defined in Harness.

type.description: This specifies the type of secret

use_ssl.description: This is the Kerberos either to use SSL/https

skip_cert_checks.description: This is the Kerberos either to skip certificate checks

use_no_profile.description: This is the Kerberos powershell runs without loading profile

WinRmTGTPasswordSpec.title: WinRmTGTPassword
WinRmTGTPasswordSpec.description: This is the SSH key authentication details defined in Harness.

use_ssl.description: This is the Kerberos either to use SSL/https

skip_cert_checks.description: This is the Kerberos either to skip certificate checks

use_no_profile.description: This is the Kerberos powershell runs without loading profile

WinRmNTLMSpec.title: WinRmNTLM
WinRmNTLMSpec.description: This is the SSH key authentication details defined in Harness.

type.description: This specifies the type of secret

domain.description: This is the NTLM domain name

username.description: This is the NTLM user name

use_ssl.description: This is the NTLM either to use SSL/https

skip_cert_checks.description: This is the Kerberos either to skip certificate checks

use_no_profile.description: This is the Kerberos powershell runs without loading profile

Link.description: Links to related resources, in the format defined by [RFC 5988](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-5). This will include a link with relation type `next` to the next page, if there is a next page.

example-1.value:
- service:
    account: sample_account
    slug: example_service
    org: sample_organization
    project: sample_project
    name: Example_service
    description: This is a example service
    tags:
      example-tag-1: example-tag-1-value
      example-tag-2: example-tag-2-value
    yaml: |
      service:
        name: "Example_service"
        identifier: "example_service"
        tags: {}
  created: 1234567890
  updated: 1234567890

  name: example_secret
  slug: example_secret

  project: example_project
  tags:

    principal: example-principal
    realm: example-realm
    key_path: key/file/path

example-secret-file-secret-request-yaml.value:

  description: example_secret

example-secret-text-secret-request-yaml.value:

  slug: example_secret

  project: example_project
  tags:

  description: example_secret

example-winrm-ntlm-secret-request-yaml.value:

  name: example_secret
  slug: example_secret
  org: default
  project: example_project
  tags:
    property1: example_secret
  description: example_secret
  spec:
    type: WinRmNTLM
    port: 5986
    domain: example-domain
    username: example-username
    password: example-password
    use_ssl: true
    skip_cert_checks: true
    use_no_profile: true
